message:
fix(security): harden floating-point arithmetic in participation weighting and sybil defense

atc_participation_weighting.rs:
- Guard against division-by-zero when established_tenure_seconds is 0 by
  returning 0.0 instead of computing an infinite tenure_component
- Replace partial_cmp().unwrap_or(Ordering::Equal) with total_cmp() for
  NaN-safe median computation — total_cmp handles NaN deterministically
  without risk of silently misordering elements

sybil_defense.rs:
- Replace partial_cmp().unwrap_or() with total_cmp() in two sorted weight
  computations for deterministic NaN ordering
- Add is_finite() guards on base_weight and max_weight to fail closed on
  NaN/Inf inputs rather than propagating poisoned values through the
  weight computation pipeline

These are defense-in-depth fixes: the callers currently produce finite
values, but the guards prevent silent corruption if upstream changes
introduce unexpected floating-point edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
